detail.description:
Eternal Tower Saga (ETS)

Break every MMORPG rule you’ve ever known! Experience a new world in Eternal Tower Saga (ETS), where "Lifestyle" meets "MMORPG" in perfect harmony. “Change your weapon, change the game. From player to game master.”
Eternal Tower Saga (ETS) is an adventure MMORPG centered around conquering mysterious towers that have appeared across the globe. By blending social lifestyle elements with classic MMORPG progression, the game offers limitless enjoyment and unparalleled freed
